name: The Scary Pack Black Cards List
blackCards: “I think I’m safe,” she whispered. But then, out of nowhere, ______!
Anne screamed. On her mirror was a message scrawled in blood: “I AM ______.”
Guillermo Del Toro is the master of supernatural horror, but even he is afraid of ______.
Tonight on Murder Files: An ordinary man, driven to kill by ______.
whiteCards: A big misunderstanding involving decapitations.
A CD of haunted house sound effects.
A cursed Fleshlight that makes you rapidly age when you fuck it.
A gremlin who spanks your wonderful ass with a fly swatter.
A mannequin that gets a little closer every time you look away.
Agonizingly transforming into a trombone.
An iguana that says “Ooh la la!” in a threatening way.
Awakening an ancient evil.
Chanting in Latin.
Crawling all over the walls and ceiling like a dumbass.
Farting the X-Files theme.
Getting disemboweled.
Having unprotected sex with The Blob.
Human sacrifice.
Knowing a bit too much about serial killers.
Night, the scariest half of the day.
Pus.
Putting the lotion on its skin.
Realizing Mom and Dad are now at an age where it wouldn’t be that unusual for them to die.
Serving a man his own testicles on a sizzling fajita platter.
Skulls and spiderwebs and shit.
Testing negative for being alive.
The current state of American democracy.
The ghostly specter of a delicious six-foot party sub that disappears when you try to take a bite.
Vagina dentata.
